prompt:
The Completionist Award II trophy staged on a clean, dusted shelf with soft backlighting, creating a gentle halo behind the silhouette. A small inspection setup is implied by a discreet light bar and a simple camera tripod in the distant blur, suggesting the display photos and lighting are logged for future checks, without any readable labels.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk interior aesthetic: warm, soft cinematic lighting, clean surfaces, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the award centered and sharply in focus so it reads instantly as an inventory icon.
